summary.zh: 从用户回合中抽取轻量 task span、任务类型和开闭状态标签。
summary.en: Extracts lightweight task spans, task types, and open/closed status tags from user turns.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要把一段 session 先拆成可分析任务片段，为后续 signal factor 提供目标边界时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to split a session into analyzable task spans and provide target boundaries for later signal factors.

limitations.zh: 当前是轻量规则抽取，长 session 的任务边界可能需要后续模型型 factor 补强。
limitations.en: This is a lightweight rule-based extractor; long-session task boundaries may need model-based factors later.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的用户回合内容，结果只输出标签和证据引用。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope user turns and outputs only labels plus evidence references.
